title: WrdActivate
text: WrdActivate Instruct the WRD to activate the specified operation on a DSP running in the Uniface Server. Explain this code $webinfo("SESSIONCOMMANDS"), "WrdActivate", InstanceName.Operation Copy Parameters InstanceName.Operation —operation on a DSP instance running on the Uniface Server. Description The WrdActivate command causes the WRD to: Check whether there is an ID of a session invalidated by the RENEW action and, if so, add the INVALIDATEDSESSION property to the $webinfo SERVERCONTEXT with the value of this invalidated session ID. Send request to Uniface Server to activate the targeted DSP operation. Example: Activating a Callback Operation Explain this code putitem/id $webinfo("SESSIONCOMMANDS"), "WrdActivate", "%%$instancename.copySessionContext" Copy Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
